commission_note: The commission amount is deducted at the time of payment by the buyer
protection_description: SHOPIN offers you practical tools, such as private messaging and a reporting system, to ensure a secure environment and trustworthy transactions.
experience_description: Whether you're buying or selling, your experience on SHOPIN will always be marked by exceptional service, unmatched simplicity, and guaranteed satisfaction.
livraison_description: A delivery person will come directly to your door to pick up or deliver your items. No more hassle with remote sales!
profile_photo_validation: We inform you that your profile photo will undergo a validation process, which may take up to a maximum of 24 hours before it is approved.
thank_you_message: We thank you for your patience and understanding.
login_to_sell_and_buy: Log in to sell and buy on SHOPIN
receive_notifications: You may receive SMS or email notifications for updates. You can unsubscribe at any time.
password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
terms_condition: Please read carefully and accept our terms and conditions before continuing.
accept_conditions: I accept the Terms and Conditions.
title: Here is the SHOPINER
Vous avez déjà signalé cette annonce !: You have already reported this item!

copyright_violation: Violation of copyright or intellectual property rights

leave_review_info: You can leave a review in the form of stars only if you have made a purchase from this seller!

subject: Subject
step_1_title: Post your item online in a flash
step_1_description: Add attractive photos, describe your item carefully, and set a competitive price.
step_2_description: Carefully pack your item. A delivery driver will come to collect it from you, with no effort on your part.
step_3_description: 24 hours after successful delivery, your payment will be made via the agreed-upon terms.
step_4_description: Join SHOPIN today, sell your items, and discover unique treasures to buy.
explore_your_way_description: Use our multi-criteria search to refine your desires or let yourself be surprised by browsing the items of other SHOPINERS until you find the perfect match.
add_to_favorites_title: Add to your favorites with one click
add_to_favorites_description: Found something you like? Tap the little heart to instantly add it to your favorites list and never lose sight of your gems.
validate_cart_title: Validate your cart in no time
validate_cart_description: Ready to give in? Click on “Validate my cart”. It couldn’t be easier: payment is made upon delivery for guaranteed peace of mind.
receive_package_description: Once your order is confirmed, a delivery person will bring it directly to your door. SHOPIN makes your shopping as convenient as it is enjoyable!
registration_description: When registering on the SHOPIN website, the user must fill out a form containing their first name, last name, pseudonym, email, phone number, and date of birth. The user can modify or delete their account at any time.
seller_commission_intro: The seller authorizes SHOPIN to retain a commission on the total price of the item as follows:
luxury_brand_commission: Luxury Brand (SHOPIN Luxury): 10% of the item price
other_category_commission: Any other category: 7% of the item price
delivery_fees_not_included: Delivery fees are not included in the commission calculation base. Once the item is received by the buyer, SHOPIN will pay the seller the price of the item minus the commission within 3 days. To receive their payment, the seller must provide proof of identity and bank details with a photo for necessary verification (CIN and RIB).
confidentiality_content: SHOPIN collects, stores, and uses certain personal data of users (first name, last name, phone number, city, and email), along with users' location data. SHOPIN ensures that users' personal information is protected against any illegal activities.
cookies_content: The site uses cookies to distinguish users/visitors from other site users in order to help SHOPIN improve their experience while navigating the site.
articles_for_sale_content: The seller commits to ensuring that any item listed for sale is free from defects (stains, holes, or tears...). The buyer, upon receiving such an item, has the right to return it. It is forbidden to resell counterfeit or illegal items. The seller agrees to provide real photos of the item being sold. The description of this item must correspond to its actual characteristics. SHOPIN has full rights to request the seller to change or remove their item, or inform them that SHOPIN will do it directly in case of an error (e.g., incorrect category).
return_content: In case of delivery failure, the seller must be available to receive the returned item.
luxury_description: An item belonging to the SHOPIN LUXURY category must:
luxury_authentication_condition: be authenticated before delivery to the buyer
luxury_category_condition: An item belonging to the SHOPIN LUXURY category will be:
luxury_sale_steps: Steps for selling an item in the SHOPIN LUXURY category:
luxury_publish_item: Publish the luxury item for sale
luxury_purchase_confirmation: After purchase confirmation, our team will inform you of the sale, and an appointment will be scheduled for pick-up
luxury_item_authentication: The item will be authenticated by our team
luxury_item_delivery: If the item is authentic, it will be delivered within 3 days
luxury_payment_confirmation: After the item is received by the buyer, your payment will be credited to your account within 24 hours
luxury_return_policy: Return policy for SHOPIN LUXURY items:
luxury_authentication_policy: SHOPIN maintains a strict policy against counterfeits. If counterfeit products, defective items, illicit duplicates (copied, reproduced, or manufactured illegally), or items violating intellectual property rights are received, our team will contact the seller by email or phone to inform them of the return of the item, providing conclusive evidence of the counterfeit, and the order will be canceled. The item will be permanently removed from the SHOPIN catalog. Return and authentication fees of 120 dirhams will be charged to the seller. The seller's information will be recorded, prohibiting them from selling counterfeit products in the future. To avoid inconvenience, the seller must provide authentic and unchanged documents such as the certificate of authenticity, invoice, or price tag. Buyers are encouraged to carefully read the full description of the item and inquire in the comments section if the item is authentic or a replica.
remaining_time_to_update: Remaining time for a new update
no_items_found: No items found for these search criteria.
modification_blocked_message: because it was changed less than 48h ago.

notifications.new_order_message:
:salutation :seller, your item :post_title has been ordered by :buyer. Please prepare the item for shipping. A courier from our logistics partner will contact you soon and pick up the item.
Thank you for clicking here to confirm or update your bank details (RIB), so we can transfer the funds when the sale process is complete.
welcome.shopin: Welcome to the world of SHOPIN, the platform that transforms your buying and selling habits. Here, every item tells a story, and each transaction becomes an opportunity to be part of a responsible and trendy movement.
why.shopin: Why choose SHOPIN? Because we are not just an online marketplace — we are a community that values your needs, your desires, and your impact. Explore a wide selection of new and second-hand items, discover hidden gems, and easily sell your own goods.
join.shopin: By joining SHOPIN, you embrace a smarter and more sustainable way of consuming. You help reduce waste while discovering unique treasures that reflect your style and values.
call.to.action: Don’t let your unused items collect dust — turn them into income. And for bargain hunters, your next favorite find is already waiting for you on SHOPIN. Join us today and become a SHOPINER — a part of a positive, practical, and rewarding change!

preamble_content:
These Terms and Conditions of Use (hereinafter "Terms") govern the use of the platform (hereinafter "the Platform"), accessible at shopin.ebuild.website.

The Platform is published by:
  • Legal form: Sole trader (Auto-entrepreneur)
  • Registered address: 21 Rue Bab al Irfane, Résidence Soukaina, Casablanca
  • Tax Identification Number: 66972656
  • Common Company Identifier (ICE): 003744801000069
  • Email: morocco.shopin@gmail.com
  • Phone: 0607534343
article1_content:
These Terms and Conditions aim to define the conditions under which the Platform connects sellers and buyers of second-hand clothing, shoes, bags and accessories, perfumes and cosmetics, toys, books and supplies, and household items.
Any access to and use of the Platform implies unconditional acceptance of these Terms and Conditions.
The Platform reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will take effect upon their online publication.
article2_content:
Platform: website and mobile application connecting sellers and buyers
Seller: registered user offering items for sale
Buyer: registered user ordering items
User: any person accessing the Platform, whether as a seller or buyer
Item: second-hand clothing, shoes, bags and accessories, perfumes and cosmetics, toys, books and supplies, and household items listed for sale on the Platform
Order: purchase of one or more items by a buyer
Commission: percentage collected by the Platform on each sale
article3_role_content:
The Platform acts exclusively as an intermediary between sellers and buyers. It does not sell items itself and does not at any point acquire ownership of the items listed for sale.
The Platform provides the following services:
Provision of a space allowing sellers to present their items
Facilitation of the connection between sellers and buyers
Management of payment collection upon delivery
Transfer of sale proceeds to the seller, after deduction of the commission
Coordination with the carrier for delivery
article3_responsibility_content:
The Seller is solely responsible for:
The authenticity, quality, condition and conformity of the items listed for sale
The accuracy of descriptions, photos and information provided
Compliance with applicable legislation (intellectual property, counterfeiting, etc.)
The actual availability of the items

The Buyer is responsible for:
Payment of the price upon delivery
Receipt of the order
Verification of the conformity of items upon receipt

The Platform does not intervene:
In the authentication or certification of items, particularly luxury ones
In the prior verification of the condition of items before listing
In the resolution of disputes relating to the quality or authenticity of items.
article4_conditions_content:
Using the Platform requires creating a user account. Registration is reserved for persons who are:
At least 18 years old
Having the legal capacity to enter into contracts
Residing in Morocco
article4_process_content:
Upon registration, the user must provide the following information:
First and last name
Valid email address
Phone number
Address
National Identity Card number (CIN)
For sellers: bank details (RIB) for payment transfers

The user agrees to provide accurate, complete and up-to-date information. Any incorrect or fraudulent information may result in the suspension or deletion of the account.
article4_security_content:
The user chooses a confidential password upon registration. They are solely responsible for keeping their credentials safe and confidential. Any use of the account is presumed to originate from its holder.

In case of loss, theft or fraudulent use of their credentials, the user must immediately notify the Platform.
article4_suspension_content:
The Platform reserves the right to suspend or delete without notice any account in the event of:
Violation of these Terms and Conditions
Fraud or attempted fraud
Behaviour contrary to public morals or public order
Non-payment of amounts due
Prolonged inactivity
article5_publication_content:
The seller may publish listings to sell their second-hand items. For each item, they must provide:
Clear and representative photographs
An accurate and honest description (brand, size, condition, material, any defects)
The desired selling price
article5_obligations_content:
The seller agrees to:
Only offer items they own or have the right to dispose of
Provide accurate and non-misleading information
Not list counterfeit, stolen or unlawfully obtained items
Not publish offensive, discriminatory or unlawful content
Keep their items available until effectively sold
Properly package items for shipment
Hand over items to the carrier within the agreed timeframe
article5_forbidden_content:
The following are strictly prohibited from sale:
Items that are counterfeit or of unlawful origin
Weapons, drugs, and dangerous products
Content of a pornographic or child pornographic nature
Items infringing intellectual property rights
Any item whose sale is prohibited by Moroccan legislation

The Platform reserves the right to remove any non-compliant listing without prior notice or compensation.
article5_price_content:
The seller freely sets the selling price of their items. This price excludes delivery charges which will be borne by the buyer and excludes the Platform's commission.

Once an item has been ordered, the price can no longer be modified.
article6_order_content:
The buyer may order one or more items available on the Platform. The ordering process is as follows:

1. Selection of the item(s)
2. Cart validation
3. Delivery address confirmation
4. Order validation

Validating the order constitutes acceptance of these Terms and Conditions and a firm commitment to payment.
article6_confirmation_content:
An order confirmation is sent by email to the buyer summarising:
The ordered items
The total price (item price + delivery charges)
The delivery address
The order number
article6_availability_content: Items are sold subject to availability. If an item becomes unavailable after an order has been placed, the buyer will be notified and the order will be cancelled free of charge.
article7_price_content:
The displayed price for each item includes:
The price set by the seller
The Commission
VAT where applicable

The total price is indicated in Moroccan dirhams (MAD) and is firm and final.
article7_payment_content: Payment is made upon delivery, in cash or by any other means accepted by the carrier, directly to the delivery person.
article7_distribution_content:
After payment is collected by the carrier:
The Platform collects its commission of 7% for items belonging to non-luxury categories and 10% for items belonging to luxury categories
The remaining amount is transferred to the seller within 36 hours after confirmation of effective delivery.
article7_delivery_fees_content: Delivery charges are borne by the buyer and calculated based on weight, dimensions and destination. They are clearly indicated before order validation.
article8_modalities_content:
Delivery is handled by a third-party carrier appointed by the Platform.

The indicative delivery time is 7 working days from order confirmation, subject to the seller effectively handing over the item to the carrier.
article8_tracking_content: A tracking number is provided to the buyer allowing them to follow the progress of their order.
article8_reception_content:
Upon receipt, the buyer must:
Check the condition of the parcel in the presence of the delivery person
Immediately report any apparent anomaly (damaged, open parcel, etc.)
Make the payment to the delivery person
Issue written reservations on the delivery note in case of damage
article9_title: ARTICLE 9 - RIGHT OF WITHDRAWAL AND RETURNS
article9_withdrawal_content: The buyer has 1 day from receipt of their order to exercise their right of withdrawal.
article9_modalities_content:
To exercise their right of withdrawal, the buyer must:
Notify their decision to the Platform by email at morocco.shopin@gmail.com
Return the item in its original condition, unworn, with its packaging
article9_excluded_subtitle: 9.3 Items Excluded from the Right of Withdrawal
article9_excluded_content:
The following are excluded from the right of withdrawal:
Underwear and intimate hygiene items
Swimwear
Personalised items
article9_return_fees_content:
Return charges are borne by the buyer, except in cases of:
Manifest non-conformity of the item
Hidden defect
Dispatch error attributable to the seller
article9_refund_content:
In the event of an accepted return:
If payment has already been made: refund within 14 days by bank transfer
If payment has not yet been made: cancellation of the transaction

The refund covers the price of the item excluding initial delivery charges (except in cases of non-conformity or hidden defect).
article10_conformity_content: The seller is bound by the legal warranty of conformity provided for by the Moroccan Dahir of Obligations and Contracts. The buyer may demand repair, replacement or refund in the event of a lack of conformity.
article10_hidden_defects_content: The seller is liable for hidden defects rendering the item unfit for its intended use or so diminishing such use that the buyer would not have purchased it had they been aware of them.
article10_limitation_content:
The Platform, in its capacity as intermediary, cannot be held liable for:
The authenticity, quality or safety of items listed for sale
The truthfulness or accuracy of listings published by sellers
Disputes between sellers and buyers relating to transactions
Damages resulting from fraudulent use of the Platform by a user

The Platform does not guarantee and does not authenticate luxury or branded items. It carries out no verification of the authenticity of products.
article10_platform_content:
The Platform is responsible for:
The proper technical functioning of the Platform
The security of personal data in accordance with regulations
The proper execution of payment collection and disbursement
Malfunctions directly attributable to it

The Platform's liability may only be engaged in the event of proven fault and is limited to the amount of the transaction concerned.
article10_force_majeure_content: The Platform cannot be held liable in the event of force majeure or events beyond its reasonable control (computer failure, cyberattack, natural disaster, act of authority, strike, etc.).
article11_general_content: Every user agrees to: comply with the laws and regulations in force in Morocco, use the Platform in a fair and appropriate manner, not infringe on the rights of third parties, and not distribute any unlawful, offensive or immoral content.
article11_forbidden_content: It is strictly prohibited to: use the Platform for fraudulent purposes, impersonate a third party, post false listings, manipulate prices or reviews, mass-extract or copy data from the Platform, or disrupt its operation.
article11_sanctions_content: Any breach of the above obligations may result in: removal of unlawful content, temporary or permanent suspension of the account, legal proceedings, and claims for damages.
article12_platform_content: All elements of SHOPIN (structure, design, texts, graphics, software, databases, trademarks, logos…) are protected by Moroccan intellectual property law. Any unauthorised reproduction, representation, modification or exploitation is prohibited and constitutes an infringement punishable under Moroccan law.
article12_license_content: The user is granted a personal, non-exclusive and non-transferable right to use the Platform, strictly limited to connecting buyers and sellers of items.
article12_ugc_content: By publishing content on the Platform (photos, descriptions, comments), the user grants the Platform a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide licence for the duration of copyright protection, to reproduce, represent and distribute such content in the context of operating the Platform. The user warrants that they hold all rights over the content they publish and that it does not infringe on the rights of third parties.
article13_content: The processing of users' personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, which forms an integral part of these Terms. By using the Platform, the user accepts the processing of their personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy and Law 09-08 relating to the protection of personal data.
article14_content: SHOPIN uses cookies to improve the user experience, analyse traffic and personalise content. The user may configure their browser to refuse cookies, but certain features of the Platform may then no longer function correctly.
article15_contact_content:
For any question or complaint, the user may contact SHOPIN customer service:
📧 morocco.shopin@gmail.com
📞 0607534343
The Platform undertakes to respond within a reasonable timeframe.
article15_law_content: These Terms are governed by Moroccan law, including: the Dahir of Obligations and Contracts (DOC), Law 31-08 on consumer protection measures, Law 09-08 on the protection of personal data, and Law 53-05 on the electronic exchange of legal data. If amicable resolution fails, any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Casablanca, Morocco.
article16_partial_content: If one or more provisions of these Terms are held to be invalid or declared as such pursuant to a law or a court decision, the remaining provisions shall retain their full force and effect.
article16_entirety_content: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between SHOPIN and users regarding the use of the Platform.
article16_waiver_content: The Platform's failure to enforce any breach by a user of any obligation under these Terms shall not be construed as a waiver of the right to enforce such breach at a later date.
article16_language_content: These Terms are written in French. In the event of a translation, only the French version shall prevail.
article17_content: Use of the Platform implies full and unreserved acceptance of these Terms. Upon creating an account, the user declares that they have read and accept these Terms without reservation by ticking the box provided for this purpose.
seller_commission_intro1: SHOPIN charges a commission on every sale made through the platform, automatically deducted from the amount paid to the seller after delivery confirmation.
luxury_brand_commission1: — Luxury items (fashion, accessories, branded perfumes): 10% commission
other_category_commission1: — Other categories (everyday clothing, shoes, toys, books, home items…): 7% commission
delivery_fees_not_included1: Delivery fees are charged to the buyer and are not included in the commission calculation. Sellers receive payment within 36 hours of delivery confirmation.
confidentiality_content1: SHOPIN processes your personal data in compliance with Moroccan Law 09-08. Collected information is used exclusively for account, order, and payment management. Contact morocco.shopin@gmail.com to exercise your rights.
cookies_content1: SHOPIN uses cookies to enhance your experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You may configure your browser to reject them, but some features may not function properly.
articles_for_sale_content1: SHOPIN is a second-hand marketplace for: clothing, shoes, bags & accessories, perfumes & cosmetics, toys, books & stationery, and home items. Sellers are solely responsible for item compliance and must not list any counterfeit, stolen, or illicit items.
return_content1: Buyers have 1 day from receipt to exercise their right of withdrawal (excluding underwear, swimwear, and personalized items). Refunds are issued within 14 days by bank transfer if payment has already been made.
luxury_description1: SHOPIN offers a dedicated category for luxury and branded items with an enhanced authentication process to ensure trust between buyers and sellers.
luxury_price_condition1: Applicable to luxury items priced above
luxury_authentication_condition1: All luxury items listed on SHOPIN are subject to an authenticity check before delivery to the buyer.
luxury_category_condition1: Luxury items are identifiable by the authentication symbol displayed on their listing:
luxury_publish_item1: The seller lists the item with photos and a detailed description.
luxury_purchase_confirmation1: The buyer confirms the order and the item is reserved.
luxury_item_authentication1: The item is sent to SHOPIN for authenticity verification.
luxury_item_delivery1: Once authenticated, the item is shipped to the buyer.
luxury_payment_confirmation1: Payment is confirmed and the seller is paid within 36 hours.
luxury_return_policy1: Luxury items benefit from the same return conditions as standard items, within 1 day of receipt.
luxury_authentication_policy1: Important: SHOPIN does not automatically authenticate all luxury items. Verification is performed upon request or for items exceeding the defined price threshold. SHOPIN disclaims any liability for items not submitted to the authentication process.
registration_description1: Using SHOPIN requires creating an account open to persons aged at least 18, residing in Morocco, and legally capable of contracting. Required information: name, email, phone, address, CIN (and RIB for sellers). False information may result in account suspension or deletion.
privacy_title: Privacy Policy & Personal Data Protection – SHOPIN
privacy_preamble_content:
This Privacy Policy aims to inform users of the SHOPIN platform about how their personal data is collected, processed, used, and protected.

Protecting your personal data is a priority for SHOPIN, which commits to complying with Moroccan law, in particular:
— Law No. 09-08 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data
— The guidelines of the CNDP (National Commission for the Control of Personal Data Protection)

Data Controller: SHOPIN — Sole trader — 21 Rue Bab al Irfane, Résidence Soukaina, Casablanca — Email: morocco.shopin@gmail.com — Tel: 0607534343 — Tax ID: 66972656.
privacy_article1_content:
Personal data: any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person.
Processing: any operation applied to personal data (collection, recording, storage, modification, extraction, use, communication, erasure, destruction).
User: any person using the Platform.
Data Controller: the operator of the Platform.
Processor: any person processing data on behalf of the data controller.
privacy_article2_direct_all_users: For all users: full name, email address, phone number, full postal address, national ID number (CIN), password (encrypted), account creation date, login history.
privacy_article2_direct_sellers: For sellers (additional data): bank details (RIB), information on items listed for sale (photos, descriptions, prices), sales history.
privacy_article2_direct_buyers: For buyers (additional data): order history, delivery addresses, purchase preferences.
privacy_article2_auto_content: While browsing the Platform, certain data is collected automatically: IP address, browser type and version, operating system, pages visited and duration, date and time of connection, approximate location data, and cookies and trackers (see Article 6).
privacy_article3_introduction: Your personal data is collected and processed for the following purposes:
privacy_article3_main_content:
Account management: creation, authentication, profile management.
Transaction execution: order processing, payment management, delivery coordination.
Matchmaking: providing a space for sellers to list items and buyers to purchase them. Transactions are conducted under a pseudonym to preserve the confidentiality of identities.
Financial management: payment collection, transfer of funds to sellers, commission deduction.
Customer service: responding to inquiries, complaints, and disputes.
privacy_article3_secondary_content:
Platform improvement: statistical analysis of user behavior, user experience optimization.
Legal obligations: compliance with tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements.
privacy_article4_internal_content: Your data is accessible internally only to authorized personnel within the scope of their duties: customer service, technical department, and accounting and finance department.
privacy_article4_partners_content:
Your data may be shared with the following third parties, strictly limited to what is necessary for the performance of their services:
— Carriers: name, surname, delivery address, phone number.
— Web host: Nindohost (Morocco).
— Analytics and statistics tools.
— Public authorities: upon legal request (judicial, tax, customs authorities, etc.).
privacy_article4_no_sale_content: SHOPIN never sells, rents, or trades your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy_article5_measures_content: SHOPIN implements all appropriate measures to protect your data against accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure or access. These measures include: password encryption (hashing), secure transmissions (HTTPS/SSL), limited data access (authentication, permissions), regular backups, firewalls and antivirus software, and regular security testing.
privacy_article5_encryption_content: Bank details (RIB) and passwords are encrypted and are never stored in plain text.
privacy_article5_user_content: Users are responsible for the confidentiality of their password. They must: choose a strong password, not share it with third parties, change it regularly, and immediately report any unauthorized use of their account.
privacy_article6_what_content: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit a website. It stores information related to your browsing session.
privacy_article6_types_content:
Strictly necessary cookies (no consent required): session and authentication cookies, security cookies, shopping cart cookies.

Functional and performance cookies (consent required): user preference cookies, audience analytics cookies (Google Analytics, etc.).

Advertising and targeting cookies (consent required): social media cookies, personalized advertising cookies.
privacy_article6_manage_content:
On your first visit, a banner informs you of cookies and requests your consent for non-essential cookies. You can at any time: update your preferences via Platform settings, configure your browser to reject cookies, or delete already-stored cookies.

Note: Refusing certain cookies may limit access to some Platform features.
privacy_article7_intro: In accordance with Law 09-08, you have the following rights over your personal data:
privacy_article7_access_content: You have the right to obtain: confirmation that your data is being processed, access to your personal data, and a copy of your data.
privacy_article7_rectification_content: You may request the correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy_article7_erasure_content:
You may request the deletion of your data in the following cases: the data is no longer necessary for the stated purposes, you withdraw your consent, you object to the processing, or the data has been unlawfully processed.

Exception: The Platform may refuse deletion if it is required to retain certain data to comply with legal obligations (accounting, tax records, etc.).
privacy_article7_opposition_content: You may object to the processing of your data based on your particular situation, as well as at any time to processing for commercial prospecting or profiling purposes.
privacy_article7_limitation_content: You may request restriction of processing in certain cases: while the accuracy of data is being verified, if processing is unlawful but you do not wish for erasure, or if you need the data to establish, exercise, or defend legal rights.
privacy_article7_exercise_content:
To exercise your rights, send an email to morocco.shopin@gmail.com accompanied by a copy of your identity document (CIN).

Response time: SHOPIN commits to responding within a maximum of 30 days from receipt of your request.
privacy_article8_content:
This Privacy Policy may be modified at any time to reflect regulatory changes, new Platform features, or improvements to our practices.

Any substantial change will be notified by email and/or Platform notification at least 15 days before taking effect.

The current version is always accessible on the Platform with the date of last update.

Continued use of the Platform after notification constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.
privacy_article9_content: In accordance with Law 09-08, the personal data processing carried out by SHOPIN has been declared to the CNDP.
validation.rib_digits: The RIB number must be exactly 24 digits.
own_post_cannot_favorite: It looks like this is your item! Favoriting is only for items from other shopiners.

ugc_description: Our platform allows users to create and publish product listings. By using this feature, you agree not to post or share content that:
ugc_rules.abusive: Is abusive, offensive, hateful, or discriminatory
ugc_rules.illegal: Contains illegal items or promotes illegal activities
ugc_policy: We have a zero-tolerance policy for objectionable content and abusive users.
moderation_rules.review: All listings may be reviewed before or after publication
moderation_rules.remove: We reserve the right to remove any listing at our discretion
moderation_rules.ban: We may suspend or permanently ban users who violate these rules
reporting_rules.report: Users can report listings or sellers that violate these rules
reporting_rules.block: Users can block sellers, which will prevent their listings from appearing again
reporting_rules.review: All reports are reviewed by our moderation team
response_description: We review and take action on reported content within 24 hours, including removing listings and suspending users when necessary.
phone_must_be_10_digits: Phone number must contain exactly 10 digits
profile_incomplete_message: Your profile is incomplete. Please fill in the following information to continue:
mode_voyage_description: Activate travel mode to hide your posts during your absence. They will automatically reappear when you turn it off.
